repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: All three are directly for max_pooling_3d (the queried operator) and cover common failure modes: (82b47b36) CMake opbuild errors at op_host/CMakeLists.txt, (ca69bb7f) output shape mismatch, and (2431219e) combined txt bundle missing blocks and CMake build failures. These are diverse and complementary, addressing both build and correctness issues likely to arise during repair.
